body: {"rationale":"All 8 rubric criteria pass. (1) Title is imperative, names subsystem (try) and the change. (2) Description has all four required sections: PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE (four precise locations with line ranges), PROPOSED FIX, NON-SCOPE. (3) AC is numbered 1–8, each verifiable. (4) AC 2–4 and 6 name specific Test* functions and a go test -run filter. (5) Final two AC lines are exactly `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test ./internal/agent/... passes` and `lefthook run pre-commit passes`. (6) Labels carry phase:2, three area: tags, kind:fix, adr:024, spec:FEAT-010, story:10, and reliability. (7) Parent (ddx-5cb6e6cd) and dep (ddx-89ab3fda) are both explicit; the dep is also called out in the description's DEPS paragraph. (8) Cold-read passes: all context is self-contained, exact file paths and line numbers are given, no /tmp references, and the dep bead is properly listed so an agent can resolve the NoProgress vocabulary without hand-curation.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":[],"waivers_applied":[]}
